message.content: The page has a light blue background. At the top left, the text "Icon:" appears in a light blue font. Below this text, there are four square icons arranged in a 2x2 grid on the left side of the page. The top - left icon is a dark navy - blue square with a white heart - shaped logo featuring an interwoven design. The top - right icon is a dark teal square with a light blue heart - shaped logo with the same interwoven design. The bottom - left icon is a light blue square with a slightly darker blue heart - shaped logo with the interwoven design. The bottom - right icon is a medium teal square with a dark teal heart - shaped logo with the interwoven design. On the right side of the page, there are four larger rounded square icons arranged in a 2x2 grid. The top - left rounded square is dark teal, containing the Arabic text "وسال" in a light blue font, the word "wesal" in a smaller light blue font below it, and a light blue heart - shaped logo with the interwoven design to the right of the text. The top - right rounded square is a medium teal color, with the Arabic text "وسال" in white, the word "wesal" in white below it, and a light blue heart - shaped logo with the interwoven design to the right of the text. The bottom - left rounded square is dark navy - blue, with the Arabic text "وسال" in light blue, the word "wesal" in light blue below it, and a white heart - shaped logo with the interwoven design to the right of the text. The bottom - right rounded square is light blue, with the Arabic text "وسال" in dark navy - blue, the word "wesal" in dark navy - blue below it, and a white heart - shaped logo with the interwoven design to the right of the text.
